meta.tourName: 親子假期 海洋公園的親子游
meta.hotel: 瑞穗天合國際觀光酒店、花蓮遠雄悅來大飯店
meta.assemblyPlace: 高雄漢佳精密工業股份有限公司

days.title: 啟程 多良車站 台東海濱公園

spots.name: 台東海濱公園
spots.desc: 當地小吃，腳踏車（雙人協力車），戶外空曠區域日照強烈

spots.name: 台東池上9號咖啡館
spots.desc: 自費，園區內低消220，可至景點拍照打卡

days.dinner: 瑞穗天合國際觀光酒店
days.hotel: 瑞穗天合國際觀光酒店

days.title: 遠雄海洋公園一日遊

spots.name: 遠雄海洋公園
spots.desc: 一日遊，建議穿著輕便服裝與防曬裝備

spots.name: 美人魚劇場
spots.desc: 12：45場次，自由入座，建議提前20分鐘入場佔位，前排觀看建議攜帶雨衣

days.lunch: 敬請自理｜海洋公園內自理
days.dinner: 花蓮遠雄悅來大飯店（中式合菜）

days.title: 天空之境沙灘車 返程

spots.name: 天空之境沙灘車
spots.desc: 兩人一台，需依現場教練指示操作，穿著包覆性鞋子，建議攜帶替換衣物

spots.name: 小野柳風景區
spots.desc: 海邊風勢強勁，請留意安全

tips.weather: 出發前請留意天氣預報，並準備適當防護用品如雨傘或雨衣，以因應天候變化
tips.toiletries: 因應政府環保政策，自2025年起旅宿業不主動提供一次性備品（如牙刷、牙膏、刮鬍刀、浴帽等），請旅客自行攜帶個人盥洗用品

beforeDepart: 若有長期用藥或特殊醫療需求，請自行攜帶必要藥品及器材
本行程途經山區道路，容易暈車者請自備暈車藥並提前服用
瑞穗天合國際觀光酒店建議攜帶泳裝與輕便服裝
遠雄海洋公園建議穿著輕便服裝與防曬裝備，前排觀看表演者建議攜帶雨衣
天空之境沙灘車建議攜帶替換的衣物，穿著包覆性鞋子

rules: 07：30 高雄漢佳精密工業股份有限公司出發
07：45 高雄中正交流道停靠點：高雄市苓雅運動中心（技擊館捷運站4號出口）
請遵循司機/導遊/領隊的專業指示與安排
第三日因當日路途較遠，中途停靠點皆為短暫休息性質，請務必配合導遊時間安排

meta.tourName: Family Holiday Ocean Park Family Trip
meta.hotel: Antroyal Hotel & Spa Ruisui, Farglory Hotel Hualien

days.title: Departure Duoliang Station Taitung Seaside Park

spots.name: Duoliang Station
spots.desc: Famous scenic spot for photo opportunities

spots.name: Taitung Seaside Park
spots.desc: Local snacks, bicycles (tandem bikes), outdoor open area with strong sunlight

spots.name: Taitung Chishang No. 9 Coffee Shop
spots.desc: Self-pay, minimum consumption NT$220 in the park, available for sightseeing and photo opportunities

days.title: Farglory Ocean Park Full Day Tour
days.lunch: At your own expense | Self-arranged within Ocean Park

spots.name: Farglory Ocean Park
spots.desc: Full day tour, recommended to wear light clothing and sun protection equipment

spots.name: Mermaid Theater
spots.desc: 12:45 show, free seating, recommend arriving 20 minutes early to secure seats, front row viewers recommend bringing raincoats

days.title: Sky Mirror Beach Buggy Return Journey

spots.name: Sky Mirror Beach Buggy
spots.desc: Two people per vehicle, must follow on-site instructor's guidance, wear enclosed shoes, recommend bringing change of clothes

spots.name: Xiaoyeliu Scenic Area
spots.desc: Strong winds by the seaside, please pay attention to safety

beforeDepart: If you have long-term medication or special medical needs, please bring necessary medicines and equipment
This itinerary passes through mountain roads, those prone to motion sickness please prepare motion sickness medication and take in advance
Antroyal Hotel & Spa Ruisui recommends bringing swimwear and light clothing
Farglory Ocean Park recommends wearing light clothing and sun protection equipment, front row show viewers recommend bringing raincoats
Sky Mirror Beach Buggy recommends bringing change of clothes and wearing enclosed shoes

rules: 07:30 Departure from Kaohsiung Hanjia Precision Industry Co., Ltd.
07:45 Kaohsiung Zhongzheng Interchange stop: Kaohsiung Lingya Sports Center (Jijiguan MRT Station Exit 4)
Please follow professional instructions and arrangements from driver/tour guide/tour leader
Day three involves longer distances, all rest stops are brief in nature, please cooperate with tour guide's time arrangements

tips.weather: Please check weather forecast before departure and prepare appropriate protective items such as umbrellas or raincoats to cope with weather changes
tips.toiletries: In accordance with government environmental policy, starting from 2025, accommodation providers will not actively provide disposable amenities (such as toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, shower caps, etc.), please bring your own personal toiletries
